experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend
experiences.team: Kustomer Platform Automations (Workflows, Business Rules, Queues & Routing)
experiences.role_description: Lead of kustomer platform automations team, providing direction for integral initiatives and ultimately responsible for high-impact projects.

achievements.title: Saved $10k/mo and reduced bug count by 97%
achievements.description: in the distributed routing system. Results derived from two projects proposed and led by Jesse that were delivered in parallel. (5 engineers x 6mo)
details: Projects: Remove reverse syncing, Extend update pattern to blend commands & composite pattern

achievements.title: Resolved core product bottleneck
achievements.description: by implementing a highly reliable and scalable solution architected in collaboration with the engineering director of kustomer @ Meta. This solution distributed the workload evenly throughout the hour and enforced rate limits on operations, relieving the bottleneck while protecting the backend services. (3 engineers x 9mo)
details: Surpassed adoption goals, reaching 2k organizations, exceeding the targeted milestone of 1k in Q1'23

achievements.title: Led in-depth investigation of denial of service vulnerability
achievements.description: successfully identifying root causes and implementing preventive measures. (1 engineer x 2mo)
details: Discovered retry loops and resource starvation as the underlying issues
Implemented effective solution by introducing an object size limit
Overcame misleading clues posed by resource starvation symptoms to successfully resolve the issue

achievements.title: Mentored L4 engineer to promotion
achievements.description: providing guidance on adapting to ambiguity and shifting from a task-oriented to a goal-oriented mindset
details: Focused on quality of work and project leadership skills through mentorship and support
Worked with EM to calibrate increases in mentee's responsibility, providing valuable insights over time into the mentees progress and blind spots

testimonial.text: Jesse has a tremendously positive impact on the team and the platform due to his robust amount of knowledge around the routing system and overall automations domain and his willingness to share. He is one of the most patient and knowledgeable engineers I've had the pleasure of working with.
testimonial.author: Eric Zorn, L5, Meta, Mentee

achievements.title: Conducted an org-wide presentation on Node.js
achievements.description: delivering comprehensive insights on the event loop, thread pool, concurrent programming, recursion, and blocking operations
details: Engaged a large audience of 300 viewers during the presentation
Received overwhelmingly positive feedback for the informative and engaging session

achievements.title: Enhanced team-wide expertise
achievements.description: by taking the lead in conducting weekly knowledge-sharing meetings
details: Covered various topics including event-driven architecture patterns, SQS visibility timeout, and monitoring tool capabilities
Facilitated learning and knowledge exchange within the team, promoting a culture of continuous growth and development

achievements.title: Elevated developer confidence org-wide
achievements.description: by extensively enhancing and improving accessibility of existing and automated integration testing suite and pushing test driven development
details: Revamped the suite to ensure comprehensive coverage, reliability and ease of use in testing processes
Boosted overall software quality and reliability through the tremendously easy-to-use integration testing suite

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend
experiences.team: Kustomer Platform Automations (Workflows, Business Rules, Queues & Routing)
experiences.role_description: Lead of kustomer platform automations team
experiences.note: This overlaps with Meta (Kustomer was acquired by Meta in 2020)

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer, Fullstack
experiences.role_description: Full stack engineer and Lead of an agile team leveraging Node.js, Angular.js, and MongoDB to develop highly scalable solutions deployed on Amazon Web Services (AWS).

achievements.title: Joined the company as a junior developer
achievements.description: and demonstrated continuous growth and development, advancing to the role of senior engineer and ultimately team lead within a span of 7 years.
details: Consistently exceeded performance expectations and took on increasing responsibilities, showcasing strong technical expertise, leadership skills, and a commitment to personal and professional growth.

achievements.title: Increased deployment frequency
achievements.description: by leading the successful migration of a frontend codebase from a monolithic repository to a micro frontend architecture. Required significant dependency adjustments and research into hosting a shared navigation system.

achievements.title: Led the migration of the front end of a business application to AWS Elastic Beanstalk
achievements.description: significantly reducing front end deployment time from 1 hour to 15 minutes.

achievements.title: Reduced development lifecycle
achievements.description: by automating management of feature environments based on git hooks. Allowed stakeholders to see development in progress and give feedback earlier.

achievements.title: Developed a highly scalable and reliable event-driven email pipeline
achievements.description: efficiently sending 0.5 million emails per day with all emails delivered within 2 minutes at peak hours.

achievements.title: Automated GDPR compliance through scripting
achievements.description: drastically reducing ticket resolution time from 30 minutes to 30 seconds.

achievements.title: Strategically removed multiple 40-gigabyte MongoDB collections without down time
achievements.description: using a smart page and walk strategy, successfully avoiding database lockups and ensuring zero customer downtime.

experiences.title: Developer and Test Technician
experiences.role_description: Developed test suites for networking protocols

achievements.title: Created DHCPv6 server test suite
achievements.description: in adherence to RFC-3315 specifications for the core product. UAT's plug into test-bed and suite is executed; Routers that pass get DHCPv6 certification.

achievements.title: Fostered a deep understanding of networking fundamentals
achievements.description: including DNS and DHCP concepts, the limits of IPv4 versus IPv6, and the OSI 7 layer model.

achievements.title: Acclimated to common unix concepts
achievements.description: such as process, file, and network management. Familiarized myself with unix commands and bash scripting.
